exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your roommate navigation forward
items: Create a comprehensive roommate preferences checklist covering lifestyle habits, cleanliness standards, and shared space expectations
Research local rental laws and tenant rights regarding roommate situations and lease obligations
Calculate and document your realistic budget breakdown for rent, utilities, and shared household expenses
Write down your non-negotiable living requirements and deal-breakers for potential roommates
Interview 3-5 current or former roommates to understand common challenges and successful cohabitation strategies
Create a detailed personal living profile document including your daily routines, work schedule, and lifestyle patterns
